calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery & For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment discovery is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on October 11, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
